title: Diimu (Masaka) sheet glass project — documented timeline
disclaimer: Journalism entries are secondary sources; verify claims via parliamentary records and MEMD files before thesis citation.

events.event: East African Glass Works used Bukakata glass sand for domestic glass production (historical).
BGS/NORA assessment of Diimu beach sand: high SiO₂ in sample; grain size predominantly 125–500 µm.
Public reporting: 'Sheet Glass Project' proposed for Diimu, Masaka — sheet glass, tiles, construction materials.
Press reporting: presidential directive to fast-track exploration with named investor (reported).
Press reporting: project still not commissioned; local economic opportunity costs discussed.

open_questions: What EIA and feasibility studies were filed with NEMA/MEMD for Diimu?
